# aikido_team_resource_link (Resource)

Links a resource (code repository, container repository, cloud, domain, or Zen app) to an Aikido team.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Link a code repository to a team
resource "aikido_team_resource_link" "repo" {
  team_id       = aikido_team.platform.id
  resource_type = "code_repository"
  resource_id   = "410020"
}

# Link a cloud account to a team
resource "aikido_team_resource_link" "cloud" {
  team_id       = aikido_team.platform.id
  resource_type = "cloud"
  resource_id   = "8206"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `resource_id` (String) The ID of the resource to link to the team.
- `resource_type` (String) The type of resource to link. Valid values: `code_repository`, `container_repository`, `cloud`, `domain`, `zen_app`.
- `team_id` (String) The ID of the team.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The composite identifier (`team_id:resource_type:resource_id`).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Import a team resource link using the format team_id:resource_type:resource_id
terraform import aikido_team_resource_link.repo "123:code_repository:456"
```
